nodes.label: AI as research assistant for finding information
nodes.grounding_span: I asked an AI model to look for some in the area and was able to find one

nodes.label: AI as drafting tool for professional emails
nodes.grounding_span: helping me write professional emails if I am not sure how to word them

nodes.label: AI reliability for legal information
nodes.grounding_span: I always double check the statute and read it myself to fact check

nodes.label: AI collaboration for research tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI delegation for simple drafting tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If it's research, I guess I would say I collaborate as I tend to ask follow up questions

nodes.label: AI use for firm-specific document editing
nodes.grounding_span: There are some things in our document drafts that are specific to our firm, and the model wouldn't know to leave them as-is

nodes.label: AI as learning tool for professional communication
nodes.label_negative: Relying solely on own communication skills
nodes.grounding_span: I would probably only use AI for more complicated emails...I don't quite feel comfortable with that yet

nodes.label: Efficient problem-solving
nodes.grounding_span: I was frustrated, so when I uploaded the photo...the model did a great job presenting me with different options

nodes.label: Accuracy and trustworthiness in legal work
nodes.grounding_span: I always double check the statute and read it myself to fact check

nodes.label: Professional growth and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I've only been in the field for a year and a half...I want to keep practicing myself

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for finding hard-to-find information
nodes.grounding_span: I was frustrated, so when I uploaded the photo...the model did a great job

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI for legal research
nodes.grounding_span: I usually assume the AI is correct, but I always double check the statute

nodes.label: Preference for self-drafting informal emails
nodes.grounding_span: would just continue writing more informal ones myself

nodes.label: Optimism about expanding AI use in accounting
nodes.grounding_span: I want to try and think of ways to help that go faster, like uploading banking transactions

nodes.label: Verification-oriented approach — double-checks AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: I always double check the statute and read it myself to fact check

nodes.label: Task-dependent interaction style — collaborates for research, delegates for drafting
nodes.grounding_span: If it's research, I guess I would say I collaborate...If it's just drafting emails or letters, I just let the AI do its thing
